title: Fix terminal CPU spin root cause

log.context: Fix terminal CPU spin root cause

Done. Here's the summary:

**Root cause:** `_auto_meta_loop` in `/mnt/data/terminal/server.py` called `_requester_from_jsonl()` once per `.output` file found in `/tmp/claude-1001/-mnt-data/`. There were 2086 such files, and for each one without a requester (all 2086 lacked one), it read and regex-scanned the two largest session JSONL files (~20MB total) — synchronously in the event loop. That's ~194 seconds of CPU per 30-second cycle. The event loop was perpetually blocked, which also explained ...(truncated)
